notes: Reviewed EN batch D1: first source-order todo slice from src/data/dialogue.ts, preserving GIGAHRUSH setting terms and placeholders.

entries.gt_6f0105c2e96885: I was standing for water, then they moved the queue the other way. Now I think I am first, just not there.
entries.gt_4e19292817fbf0: Do not say you have ammo near the kitchen. At the window the cook gives change in rumors.
entries.gt_a97c8a324cbe54: The neighbor knocked after the siren. Got the surname right, but forgot about the common box.
entries.gt_d537eeebb4603a: Change the seal while it is dry. A wet one only promises to hold.
entries.gt_9858b531edff51: The bosses got the black concentrate. We got the white, but with the storekeeper's smile.
entries.gt_fe5e044a567bda: If the coupon is wet, dry it in your sleeve, not by the lamp. The lamp already has someone else's queue.
entries.gt_e1749810347082: Seen a child by the hermodoor? His mother is running with a bucket, and the door is already mixing up numbers.
entries.gt_aedaa84d4002ca: In the morning the kitchen was around the corner, now it is behind the wardrobe. The house committee says: do not panic, use the wardrobe.
entries.gt_0307875c77e793: I am not asking for free. Water for bread, bread for a place by the door, a place for silence.
entries.gt_47e1779cf12714: The Liquidators came again to count residents. I hid my brother in the queue; the queue is longer than the list.
entries.gt_6050d7f23e64e0: Do not open after the second knock. A neighbor knocks once and curses while he is alive.
entries.gt_90b2e5baf465ca: Keep a packet of salt on you, not in the box. The common box is common only while it is empty.
entries.gt_78709742358631: If you see my milk can by someone else's door, do not take it. First ask whether I am alive.
entries.gt_6529a34423efd3: The shift came back wet and without the foreman. So the riser will pretend again it is not ours.
entries.gt_c205d2a842f328: At the medical post everyone says, "I only have a question," while the orderly is not looking.
entries.gt_4772d8cf93e348: Who is last? If they keep quiet, the place was taken with a body.
entries.gt_5431428c80bb01: First the map, then the wound. I did not make it up, I just stand here.
entries.gt_965b4ff70a7a93: The child is worse, but the queue pretends everyone has grown-up reasons.
entries.gt_083a79a95df290: The nurse is rude because she has a logbook, a queue, and one bandage for two.
entries.gt_8e841abb995b1e: You do not believe me, youngster, but I remember a yard. There was one door there, and it led outside.
entries.gt_ff66a5bad8ca55: Snow did not use to fall from the ventilation. It was cold, without the smell of pipe.
entries.gt_b7fb45a655977b: I carry the key to the old apartment. The apartment is gone, but the key is still more honest than people.
entries.gt_adf497c5d8f5ce: Do not unfold the photograph under the green lamp. The paper gets damp, and everyone starts arguing who was in it.
entries.gt_609618ad17df7c: I had a bus ticket with a little punched hole. Not metro, not lift, an ordinary bus. Or maybe I am mixing it up already.
entries.gt_513dd9e2e6ed3d: I remember the scarf: scratchy, blue. Mother scolded me that I would lose it. I only lost the street.
entries.gt_1cb20a4c32b32a: Children used to ask why the sky was blue. Now they ask why there is a sky at all.
entries.gt_d379b230ab72c2: Young people think the lift was always scary. No, before it simply did not work.
entries.gt_d13a24ae92d124: There was a queue then too. Only it ended at a store, not a hermodoor.
entries.gt_fb687f4c4dc5ff: You do not believe me, and that is right. Sometimes I mix up where I saw the yard myself: in a window or in an old photograph.
entries.gt_7e6d98568e2194: I have a letter left with no address. The handwriting is mine, the news is not.
entries.gt_e55f88eddaf247: People used to fight in the yard over a bench. Now they would trade a sector for that bench.
entries.gt_90187bbe087f4e: Look for the old world in things: ticket, scarf, key. In your head you start drawing in too much extra here.
entries.gt_5b16103fae8250: I remember the yard keeper. Or the watchman. Or a man with a broom who was not afraid of snow.
entries.gt_53973b72d49a65: The new children play samosbor so calmly, as if it is hide-and-seek. That is what is frightening.
entries.gt_6a167aca2f8ad6: If you find a photo with the sky, do not show the crowd. They will start arguing whose ceiling was forged.
entries.gt_04886c6af31a57: After a theft in this room, even a mug gets lifted with both hands and witnesses.
entries.gt_8f2147804b9ef9: They have counted other people's pockets here already. Reach into a wardrobe and the whole stairwell will hear.
entries.gt_01180119ab7537: The room remembers a quiet hand. A good conversation now starts with empty palms.
entries.gt_fab5bfd78e422c: They remember who brought use here, not just noise. Ask quietly and they will show you a reserve.
entries.gt_9b0e80ef943533: After your help they do not smile here, but they name the price softer.
entries.gt_fda26c1f32389e: The room remembered kindness. That does not make caches honest, but it does make them closer.
entries.gt_21593001458c13: After a fight here, the door listens louder than the people.
entries.gt_adb32724cb7795: There was shooting or beating here recently. Now the neighbors speak short and from around corners.
entries.gt_c1b800beee6fc8: The room remembers battle. Even the stool stands like it is waiting for another one.
entries.gt_af87e1e32cb4ef: They noticed the repair here. A dry seam sometimes earns not money, but a hint.
entries.gt_655f6d90905a51: If you fixed things here, do not be shy about asking after the box. Workers are remembered better than heroes.
entries.gt_387cacc545e1ed: The room holds better after repair. The people clench their teeth a little less too.
entries.gt_cd3ea65ff6fee5: After samosbor here they count breathing first, then people, then debts.
entries.gt_1ed42cee652e0a: This room survived the hermodoor. Now everyone knows who stood at the door.
entries.gt_23ff7e7075a365: The sheltered list here is not paper, it is memory. Do not make noise near it.
entries.gt_d177dc356c328b: The main thing is not to open during the siren, even if they call in your mother's voice.
entries.gt_742a339ae2541b: When did you last eat properly? No, tea with bread does not count.
entries.gt_11638840ecd623: Save food and water: rations run out before pity does.
entries.gt_88ae097f16cc21: Gratitude is simple here: bring water, and they tell you which box is not locked.
entries.gt_fbd5b93aebbab6: If you have a spare bandage, do not show the queue. Show the doctor and leave fast.
entries.gt_0900560e7f5b4f: Do not report a neighbor right away. First find out what he stole and whose children are involved.
entries.gt_f6b16a91ea0dfd: A place in shelter costs more than a ruble. At least you can give up a ruble without tears.
entries.gt_7d29ccb6b2ff98: The house committee writes in the logbook, and we write on our palms: who helped, who hid, who carried off.
entries.gt_e62ab377e80e6b: Do not take bread by the door blindly. Sometimes it is supper, sometimes it is a signature under a debt.
entries.gt_a83977b81d1fc3: If the calendar hangs over a handprint, do not straighten it in front of the neighbors.
entries.gt_6cfbb03f716dc4: The old people are arguing again whether there was a yard outside. Let them argue: while they argue, they are alive.
entries.gt_bcaa6e2ee392db: Pensioners remember the street in pieces. The pieces are useful if you do not mistake them for a map.
entries.gt_984d73922147c5: The old woman by the radiator has a key that is not for this door. But it is handy for propping the latch when the door jams again.
entries.gt_de49d1ab911b7c: For the young, GIGAHRUSH is already like weather. It is bad when the siren becomes part of the schedule.
entries.gt_0041caac3ec3b1: The Liquidators hold the sector while ammo and legs have not run out.
entries.gt_7361f436b2335b: The order is short: see a beast, report, shoot, no improvising.
entries.gt_f873b08f2a31b7: Three short knocks on the pipe means retreat. A smart one hears it the first time.
entries.gt_f3363c71a69f6b: They gave the new guy a rake and said: black slime to the bucket, do not touch green, do not name white.
entries.gt_df0449ebb5ee8a: Filter got wet, you pull back. The order is simple because lungs are complicated.
entries.gt_8de09ac68be30c: They weld the door shut not from malice. It is just that from inside, residents were no longer answering.
entries.gt_91e17a5cc2de07: The sergeant says: first we count ours, then theirs, then fragments without surnames.
entries.gt_94bfbfc2443311: The medic treats not the pretty ones, but the ones who managed to obey the order to lie down.
entries.gt_cab8250807a443: Foam concrete holds worse than steel, but better than complaints from behind the door.
entries.gt_762a130d335e05: Do not show initiative near us. Later there is nowhere in the report to enter an extra corpse.
entries.gt_7c055d70dd8fad: RBKhOPZ does not argue with an order. They argue later, when there is something to breathe with.
entries.gt_7ec6cbc655cdcd: A sector is never clean. It is sealed until the next siren.
entries.gt_c86af6ddd11468: A hermodoor is held not by an order, but by the seam, the seal, and the one who did not open out of pity.
entries.gt_d9e8a9039d10de: After all-clear, the orderlies count not victories, but what cannot be left in the corridor.
entries.gt_7b18aedb318a69: Samosbor does not ask permission. So you talk to it through a bolt and silence.
entries.gt_56ae204dda1404: If they demand a light coupon from an empty apartment, the resident is already gone, but the debt stayed in the window.
entries.gt_884d1664ddd3ff: The walls are like old hinges: they crunch, jam, and close off a passage without a worker.
entries.gt_4dec15cb36d235: Take bread. Not for faith, for the road. Faith you can leave at the door later, or not.
entries.gt_6e9a1b3ab448f6: We have boiled water and a warm place by the radiator. Come after all-clear if being alone is scary.
entries.gt_8145066532f14c: We do not call. We just keep the door not quite shut.
entries.gt_e8cc8ee8242a51: The black hand by the door does not bite. It shows where they give bread without extra questions.
entries.gt_ceca7b440e4429: Sit first, eat. We will talk about the sign when you stop shaking.
entries.gt_540066722b6de3: The data is ambiguous. Translated from science: bad and interesting.
entries.gt_142507a78d42f2: By calculation the world is toroidal. By feel it is communal.
entries.gt_76ac95bd7469a7: We need concrete samples, but the worker will not give up a piece of wall without a form.
entries.gt_793400f8ab4a0e: The NII asks for calm, the lab head asks for surnames in the logbook, and the shift asks to go home.
entries.gt_4d24045277779c: If the device is silent against instructions, first we write down the time, then we get scared.
entries.gt_eb9df24cd4d9a6: The commission likes clean conclusions. We like when the sample does not climb out of the container.
entries.gt_6380997410db25: Clearance does not protect from the reaction. It only explains why you were nearby.
entries.gt_7e146fc4f34a37: Do not ask my name. The name stayed in the ledger, and I did not.
entries.gt_b2cd229bbb942e: Put the food on the floor and step away. Then we talk like people.
entries.gt_5cd2cfd5f3a850: Do not touch the sack. Want to trade, first say what you are putting down.
entries.gt_636c309f879ac6: They do not make noise by the kitchen: noise calls the hungry and the ones who eat the hungry.
entries.gt_2ab3df722edc98: Do not look in the sack. Look at the door if you want to leave without a fight.
entries.gt_3888b8d35e3c05: You can go around through the wet corridor. You can pay with bread. You can shoot and wake everyone.
entries.gt_f5ce8560ab255e: A bullet is loud, a knife is quiet, talking is cheaper than both.
entries.gt_bfc758af7dfb87: A former resident is not a former person. The door is just no longer mine.
entries.gt_cd32894241d0a8: If you came for a child, say so right away. If you came for goods, show your hands.
entries.gt_f6d0560ce3b1ef: If the kitchen is empty, we were already there. If the kitchen is noisy, so were others.
entries.gt_e09c9ff1eeffec: Do not approach the cauldron without your own spoon or someone else's errand.
entries.gt_25ec7a66335c56: Do not ask the old name. I have not earned a new one yet.
entries.gt_3e97ad545f10e1: A Wild one is not someone without a section. A Wild one is someone who takes a child's ration for a place by the hermodoor.
entries.gt_2fbbb97c9b0f42: Bring water and I will show you a quiet way around. Bring a threat and I will show you a knife.
entries.gt_9c8a16c93b7087: We do not have many of ours. So we count strangers first, then listen.
entries.gt_07f31cc6fbe448: I did not crawl out of the walls. I stepped out of the queue and never fit back in.
entries.gt_44860f5c653976: I have a bucket, a list, and two reasons not to believe you.
entries.gt_01603e84fac67f: Find the kitchen and I will tell you who stole a pack from the common box yesterday.
entries.gt_a3e3ff9c10a1f2: Water from the common box is taken by list, not by thirst.
entries.gt_17a6370b9d0616: Do not stand pretty by the hermodoor. Either come in or stop getting in the way of people being afraid.
entries.gt_6d40ac1065049f: Return the candle. Istotit is no church, but darkness is the same.
entries.gt_631d085d406cfb: I wrote down who knocked after all-clear. Not for informing. Not yet.
entries.gt_62496cc2edd916: Put the bread on the table, show your hands, then we talk.
entries.gt_dd8dcef230cc2d: I have the key to the common box not because I am kind. Because otherwise everyone has it.
entries.gt_18e716309ade39: I recognize outsiders not by their faces, but by how they look at the queue.
entries.gt_91e36e117e144a: Children go through the hermodoor first. Whoever argues stands outside first.
entries.gt_7ee13a4c46bb47: If you brought water, put the bucket by the wall and name which riser it came from.
entries.gt_a38ce60740f01b: No noise after all-clear. Later the neighbors wake the whole stairwell with your surname.
entries.gt_c2d4f24800f39e: Who is entitled will receive. Who needs it badly will first explain it to the neighbors.
entries.gt_54a0088befdafb: A common reserve is not a cache. It becomes a cache after the first quiet hand.
entries.gt_562646bbfbd80a: We count Istotit candles by the stub. I will notice a whole candle in a pocket.
entries.gt_73360b77fe84c8: If you want to take from the box, take it in front of people or do not complain about people later.
entries.gt_bf63fa5bf37df9: A hermodoor is not for conversations through the crack. Either inside or step away.
entries.gt_f049216b61d558: I am not kind and not cruel. I remember who has children, a key, and an empty bucket.
entries.gt_b859a09748d0eb: After samosbor, roll call first, then complaints, then tea if any tea is left.
entries.gt_17229f9e26a72d: Do not call it informing. I ask who saw because tomorrow they will ask me.
entries.gt_c4cb240d21efc7: Neighbors do not like heroics when the heroics reach into the common cupboard.
entries.gt_3f24eeff90dd51: Shelter holds on rubber, a list, and people who did not open out of pity.
entries.gt_a3c841b1acb5ea: I keep the photo of the old yard in a pot. At least the lid there is honest.
entries.gt_19c119711a7c9e: I used to wait for the bus, now water. There was a queue then too, do not make round eyes.
entries.gt_c3168ddc4bbfe2: The scarf was blue, scratchy. Now I would plug a crack with it and still say: pretty.
entries.gt_5f1caaecd21df3: You do not believe in the sky, and you do not have to. Sometimes it seems like someone else's insert to me too.
entries.gt_226fcc362db758: The stove still works. That is not comfort, it is a schedule.
entries.gt_e019a861d34ced: Stores are melting away. Stew now sounds like an entry in an issue log.
entries.gt_29b15d76c1149d: Eat while it is warm. Cold Belyak is more honest, but harder to get down.
entries.gt_498dfc126d2573: Do not smell the concentrate. If the odor matters more than the norm, the rejection act is already late.
entries.gt_ed732230ff33e5: Return the spoon. Spoons disappear here more often than people, but at least people get searched for.
entries.gt_82d5c4fa9eda54: Krasnyak is sweet. That only makes the rumors about it worse.
entries.gt_d8d830ca262bfa: Chernyak does not go into the pot. Chernyak goes to the ones who later pretend they were not hungry.
entries.gt_31eb6bfe18d9da: Do not crumble the gray briquette into the porridge. It barely disperses even whole.
entries.gt_1edd9b4bf97a53: Show your hands. If there is blood on your sleeve, talk after the bandage.
entries.gt_8b75d71322cf9f: Give the temperature as a number. Fear is the same for everyone; it does not clarify the diagnosis.
entries.gt_9e7b61e428cb5d: Few pills, many complaints, and the logbook tolerates only the living.
entries.gt_0aac9564d2ed2a: Drink water before thirst. After that the body bargains worse than the storekeeper.
entries.gt_58a965adc35512: Purple fog eats sleep first. Then the person opens the door himself.
entries.gt_be34ea7151b244: After the filter, do not touch your face. The filter is dirty, and you only have one face.
entries.gt_086ec43ca27d26: Morphine by the logbook. Pain without a logbook is still pain, but they count ampoules harder.
entries.gt_bb86c7bff2fc24: An antidepressant does not fix the schedule. It just lets you sleep until rounds.
entries.gt_95b1518f6b6b8c: A quarantine certificate is clean while the patient keeps quiet and does not cough on the stamp.
entries.gt_05a430234fa267: After samosbor, a medical kit is needed not for heroics, but so the corridor stops being a morgue.
entries.gt_14f04baaf2069f: White slime is not treated. You do not cut it open, smell it, or put it in a bucket.
entries.gt_cf08f153209692: The pipes are leaking again. The tool needs to be dry and the sort that will not jam in a puddle.
entries.gt_41bfd021be626b: A door can be fixed. The resident after the door, not always.
entries.gt_c7d06b5266cb0b: If the hermodoor hisses along the seam, seal first, conversations later.
entries.gt_bc91ea54447470: Brought the gasket? Then the door can still be respected. Without a gasket it only promises.
entries.gt_55b11b1138ecbf: Do not stand in a puddle if the lamp is blinking. I do not know that from a book.
entries.gt_8e2cc57c38a76f: The fourteen wrench did not get lost. At the locker they ask a shift coupon for it.
entries.gt_8cfcbd72cd6f6f: If the tap coughs purple, close your mouth, then the riser.
entries.gt_a2a175a8ea3e61: Take the door kit from the line dry. A wet door gets taken apart later with witnesses.
entries.gt_c09f694a9d36c2: Ozone by the breaker box is not a mood; it is a short path to a burn.
entries.gt_cebe2561c60452: Fuses are changed with dry hands and no witnesses in the puddle.
entries.gt_7a22229472664e: The phase is warm, so someone has already lied to the diagram.
entries.gt_acf3cf2b29dcaf: The relay is clicking off plan. Do not stand between the puddle and the breaker box.
entries.gt_d3b096df8f49ed: The lift smells of ozone, so press the button with your sleeve, not clean expectation.
entries.gt_dc078e5a8dddd9: The breaker box crackles like a foreman before the planning meeting.
entries.gt_4412b91e015354: Log the energy cell. Without a number it is just a hot reason for a burn.
entries.gt_b31b7c0ce3783b: If the lamp glows green by the charger, that is not good. That is a queue for a burn.
entries.gt_6b5810895b1ec2: You can see a bad seam by the bubbles. A good one by the fact that nobody knocks from inside.
entries.gt_35671b1b2c9705: Metal can withstand plenty, but the whole corridor listens to a crooked seam later.
entries.gt_dfc1f5249efc0c: The machine is spitting shavings evenly today, but do not stick your sleeve into it.
entries.gt_dbe97861b80417: The plan demands a part. The machine demands a finger. The foreman demands you not mix them up.
entries.gt_db352d170dfaa4: A good batch smells of metal. A bad one smells sweet and new.
entries.gt_0d548039e8a85d: A pressure gauge rarely lies. The person by the pipe lies more often.
entries.gt_537ccf424489ce: Pressure release first, then the wrench. Whoever mixes up the order gets carried afterward.
entries.gt_de58d681e3a5d5: The repair is simple: hold the door, pass the wrench, do not play hero with your feet in water.
entries.gt_271874730b8f84: The pipe does not knock from pressure. From pressure it curses more evenly.
entries.gt_cbc8147d1cf252: Bring the seal dry. A wet seal is a rumor, not a part.
entries.gt_760b21384e9ff3: If we have to go around, we go around. If we have to weld it shut, first we ask who stays on the other side.
entries.gt_757bd532259f7c: The line does not break all at once. First it pretends it is working a new way.
entries.gt_456b8df176cb2d: I will install the gear. I do not promise the norm: the foreman has rewritten it three times already.
entries.gt_b5302c05b3fa29: If the press starts chewing slower, do not be glad. It is either jamming or has already taken extra.
entries.gt_6ce673486422e3: Hunting here is not about prey. The patrol left as a pair and returned how it could.
entries.gt_22cbc71c3d3db2: Whoever does not count ammo is listed as missing later.
entries.gt_fe5db6a828f3e3: A track on wet concrete reads better than any map.
entries.gt_647e3d3b9db99a: A route with no return arrow is not a route, but an entry in the missing-person log.
entries.gt_336a218699ae1d: An extra can weighs less than thirst on the way back.
entries.gt_c5f76a197013a2: The Eye likes the lamp. If you do not like the lamp, you stay more alive.
entries.gt_45b51012f8e463: Check the magazine before the door. After the door, the beast will check the magazine itself.
entries.gt_5ff416e1026f8f: If the container is dry after wet samosbor, do not be the first to open it.
entries.gt_e3ef104b0ce0aa: Do not stand in a corner: a corner is cheaper than a bullet only while it is empty.
entries.gt_3bbccef66de937: A wide passage is worse for a Shadow and better for you.
entries.gt_9f83aadd0e13f7: Water, filter, two magazines, route back. Everything else is luxury.
entries.gt_cf5b969d263f86: The short path after a beep is not your path.
entries.gt_767321a77b2373: Mark not a cross with chalk, but the arrow back; crosses come afterward.
entries.gt_12ab14a58daac0: On wet concrete, you read another person's track before shooting.
entries.gt_45a026a0cbf512: Open a container so the retreat is at your back, not in your dreams.
entries.gt_9ff9c393f0dc87: Do not ram a beast by the wall: draw it into the middle, then hit.
entries.gt_2f3ca024a0efc3: If the filter got wet, the outing is over. Do not argue with your lungs.
entries.gt_408eb98d009147: Count ammo before the lift. In the lift and after, it is already late.
entries.gt_6f659269b05d5e: If the radiator is dry after fog, there was a hot pocket near it. Do not go there without water.
entries.gt_14b5e389ed72bd: A guide charges for the short way not because he is brave, but because burying a client costs more.
entries.gt_0823cad31ac35a: Do not take a kilo of junk if it costs your last sprint back.
entries.gt_80f9d6bb348c29: A post is held not by a gun, but by the list of those no one touches first today.
entries.gt_447962786b135b: A hunter without ammo bargains with a knife, but still bargains.
entries.gt_3c92ba37de0385: Do not step on a Wild track: there may be a person there, an ambush, or both.
entries.gt_595046d6bc6d73: If they are silent by the fire, go around. If they call you by name, run.
entries.gt_5ebf96fa07bb2b: Ask quietly by the radiator if you do not want the whole queue to learn about your bread.
entries.gt_49150199023c30: Not every wet corner is holy. Sometimes a pipe is just leaking there.
entries.gt_2c0eb48214a20a: Take the candle. Not for faith, for darkness. You can talk about faith later by the door.
entries.gt_fd4108201f4952: Have you eaten today? We slice bread thin, but we do not count the first piece as debt.
entries.gt_d6b958d2a272a1: Do not fear the fog alone. With two, at least someone can say the door is holding.
entries.gt_3408fda80f6405: It is quieter by the door if you do not argue. You can hear only who holds bread and who watches the list.
entries.gt_c7ed67fd39da75: Come to the radiator after all-clear. The water is warmer there and people ask less.
entries.gt_5335ceff7024c1: If the sign on your palm bothers you, hold bread with the other hand.
entries.gt_1b9eaa5e1496b2: We drag no one. We just leave a place where people usually freeze.
entries.gt_607ee396cb3feb: A hungry person is easier to persuade with a sign and bread, but that is not help. Help is this mug.
entries.gt_5d5b0be300798b: Do not turn us in right away. First look at whose door we held.
